summary: Tested Activity Modal redesign in TripBuilder. All 9 features tested and working correctly: modal opens with correct header format, search filter, category sidebar, time filter buttons, activity card display with all required elements, ...more link for description expansion, Select button triggers vehicle selection modal, Selected state with green styling, and Close button.
critical_code_review_comments: Activity Modal correctly implements the redesigned layout matching the Transfer Modal pattern
Modal header shows 'Add Activity in {city} (Day X: {date})' format correctly
Search input filters activities by name and description - tested with 'Wine' query showing 2 results
Category sidebar shows 'All Options' plus dynamic categories (City Tours, Food & Drink, Adventure) from activities
Time filter buttons (All, Morning, Afternoon, Full Day) are visible and clickable with proper styling
Activity cards display all required elements: title, starts/duration, description with ...more link, transfer info line with checkmark, PRIVATE TRANSFERS badge, price, and Select button
Clicking Select opens VehicleSelectionModal with vehicle options (4 Seater Sedan - Recommended, 7 Seater Car - Upgrade)
After vehicle selection, activity shows 'Selected' state with green button and green border styling
Footer shows activity count and selected count (e.g., '3 activities available | 1 selected')
Close button (X) and footer Close button both work to dismiss the modal

data-testid attributes properly implemented: activity-modal-title, activity-search-input, activity-cat-*, activity-time-*, activity-option-*, select-activity-*, activity-modal-close, activity-modal-done
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Tbilisi activity data (3 activities available)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Modal redesign is complete and working. Modal opens from Day cards via 'Add Activity in {city}' button. Features tested: 1) Modal header with city and date, 2) Search filter, 3) Category sidebar (All Options, City Tours, Food & Drink, Adventure), 4) Time filters (All, Morning, Afternoon, Full Day), 5) Activity cards with title, starts/duration, description with ...more, transfer info, PRIVATE TRANSFERS badge, price, Select button, 6) Vehicle Selection Modal opens on Select click, 7) Selected state with green styling, 8) Close button works, 9) Footer shows count. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.

features_tested.modal_opens_correctly: PASS - Modal opens when clicking 'Add Activity in Tbilisi' from Day 1 card
features_tested.modal_header_format: PASS - Shows 'Add Activity in Tbilisi (Day 1: Fri, 10 Apr 2026)'
features_tested.search_filter: PASS - Filters activities by name and description (tested with 'Wine' - showed 2 results)
features_tested.category_sidebar: PASS - Shows 'All Options', 'City Tours', 'Food & Drink', 'Adventure' - clicking filters the list
features_tested.time_filter_buttons: PASS - All, Morning, Afternoon, Full Day buttons visible and clickable
features_tested.activity_card_display: PASS - Shows title, starts/duration, description with ...more, transfer info, PRIVATE TRANSFERS badge, price, Select button
features_tested.more_link_expansion: PASS - Clicking ...more expands description, shows ...less to collapse
features_tested.select_triggers_vehicle_modal: PASS - Clicking Select opens Vehicle Selection Modal with 4 Seater Sedan (Recommended) and 7 Seater Car (Upgrade)
features_tested.selected_state_styling: PASS - After vehicle selection, activity shows 'Selected' green button and green border
features_tested.close_button: PASS - X button and footer Close button both dismiss the modal

activities.name: Full Day Tour Ananuri, Gudari and Kazbegi - Private Transfers
